messages.text:
Per a <@U012MBNJ67K> and <@U06F97BPQJU> discussion about how to handle this, it was stated that SL will just reproduce the data that is needed (or fill in the blanks from the ISU data)  with testing at PRI. This way we just side step all of the potential issues that may arise with using the current data. 

We can certainly dialogue about this if we want to in a quick 15 or 30min zoom call.
Can we put it on the Monday morning discussion?

I did push Matt for a copy of his contract with Colorbiotics and he said no when Eric and I met him for lunch before Jim joined Soylei. I think Matt is the one likely to get pushed really hard from Colorbiotics. But I could be mistaken.
I suggest Jim be the one to engage Kent and/or Matt if at all on this subject and the rest of us stay out of it.

I already have a path forward here with CB…this is a commercial matter. Nacu and Austin will layout for me the testing needed to be done at PRI, we will control our own data from that point. The backup data published from ISU would be nice, but hasn’t been published yet. 

Everyone have a good weekend
